response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and software development skills with exposure to diverse technologies and domains, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the Principal Performance Architect role, particularly in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, and hardware-software co-design. His background in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time data processing) and open-source contributions suggests potential, but a deeper dive is needed to assess fit.
strengths: Extensive experience in performance-sensitive systems (e.g., low-latency microservices, real-time data processing).
Diverse technical background spanning embedded, web, and AI-agent infrastructure, indicating adaptability.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, reflecting passion for engineering excellence.
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization (key requirements).
Career focus has been primarily on full-stack/web development, with limited exposure to hardware-software co-design.
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS + photography) does not meet the preferred PhD/Master's threshold for this senior role.
